foot_live_url:
<script>
sport="football"; //football or tennis
default_site=0; //[0] all matches, [4] in play, [2] not started, [3] finished, [9] yesterday 

iframe_width=650; //min. value: 500
iframe_height=850;
background_color="fff";

links_color="069"; //menu links
links_hover="c00";
show_menu=1; //[1] yes, [0] no

font_type="verdana";
font_size=11;
font_color="000";
font2_color="aaa"; //started time, half-time, odds
font3_color="c00"; //in-play score
font4_color="c00"; //highlighted team, when goal is scored

table_head_background_color="069";
table_head_font_color="fff";
table_head_border_color="000";
table_head2_background_color="ddd"; //tennis court name
table_row1_background_color="eee";
table_row2_background_color="fff";

timezone="+0"; //[-24 to +24] time difference from CET in hours
</script>
<script src="https://www.livexscores.com/free.js"></script>
message:
